hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_file_path"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.(tsx|ts|jsx|js)$"; then ISSUES=""; if grep -q "use client" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && grep -qE "(getServerSideProps|getStaticProps)" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then ISSUES="$ISSUES Server functions in client component."; fi; if grep -qE "/dev/null; then ISSUES="$ISSUES Use next/image instead of ."; fi; if grep -qE "/dev/null && ! grep -q "next/link" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then ISSUES="$ISSUES Use next/link instead of ."; fi; if [ -n "$ISSUES" ]; then echo "{\"message\": \"Next.js quality:$ISSUES\"}"; fi; fi'
